{"code":"from collections import Counter
issues = linear.list_issues(state="in_progress")
assignees = [issue["assignee"] for issue in issues]
counts = Counter(assignees)
print(counts)
top_assignee, top_count = counts.most_common(1)[0]
print(top_assignee)
print(top_count)"}
